Join the community

Be part of Africa's sports tech ecosystem from the very beginning

AfricanSTN is in its early stages. Register now to become a founding community member - the first group we reach out to as the platform develops.

Early community

There is no cost, no commitment, and no immediate expectation

AfricanSTN is building the foundations for a network that brings together founders, sport organisations, investors, operators, and partners across Africa and global markets.

By joining now, you become part of the early supporter community - the first group we reach out to as the African Sports Technology Network develops.

What early membership means
  • → Occasional updates as the initiative evolves
  • → Early access to insights, research, and ecosystem mapping
  • → Invitations to help shape the platform
  • → Future event and conversation opportunities

AfricanSTN is building thoughtfully and progressively. We would love you to be part of the journey from the start.

Who AfricanSTN is for

The platform is open to all parts of the sports tech ecosystem

International companies

Sports tech companies from outside Africa looking to enter, distribute, or maintain compliance in South Africa. AfricanSTN provides POPIA representation and market entry support.

African ventures

African-founded sports tech startups and established businesses seeking visibility, partnerships, and connections within the ecosystem. Register interest in directory inclusion - AfricanSTN curates the directory and will be in touch.

Sport organisations

Federations, leagues, clubs, and sport bodies looking to understand and procure sports technology solutions. AfricanSTN helps you navigate the landscape.

Registration

Get in touch

Complete the form below. AfricanSTN responds within two business days.

Form not loading? Open directly →

What happens next

After you register

1 · Acknowledgement

AfricanSTN will acknowledge your registration within two business days and confirm the next step based on your interest.

2 · Brief conversation

For most enquiries, a short call or email exchange to understand your organisation and what would be most useful.

3 · Proposal or onboarding

For services, AfricanSTN will provide a clear proposal. For directory enquiries, AfricanSTN will confirm whether inclusion is appropriate and discuss next steps.

We use cookies and local storage to improve your experience. Essential cookies are required for the site to function. Optional cookies help with analytics and remembering your preferences. Learn more
